text: Official Flood Warning: Heavy rainfall and urban flooding expected in low-lying areas. Avoid travel through waterlogged roads. Follow local authorities.
Official Advisory: Residents in ground-floor homes near the river should prepare to evacuate if instructed by local authorities. Do not enter floodwater.
Official Flood Warning: Ignore forwarded messages about open routes. Follow municipal control room updates only.
Official Alert: Heavy rain may cause waterlogging and power disruption. Keep phones charged. Avoid contact with electrical switches if water enters the home.
Official Weather Warning: Intense rainfall expected overnight. People in low-lying areas should remain alert and follow local authority instructions.
